name: @pi-elixir/extension-internal
description: Internal TypeScript extension workspace for pi-elixir

scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:guard && pnpm run lint:structure && oxlint -c .oxlintrc.json --type-aware --type-check src/
scripts.fmt: oxfmt --write .oxfmtrc.json .oxlintrc.json package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts src/ test/
scripts.fmt:check: oxfmt --check .oxfmtrc.json .oxlintrc.json package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts src/ test/
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run fmt:check && pnpm run test && pnpm run test:dupes
